short_description: Missed trash collection on Munroe Court — cart set out but not emptied
description:
Hello,

This is Juan Hernandez at 327 Munroe Court in West Annapolis. My trash cart was at the curb by 6:30 AM on the regular Tuesday pickup, but the truck passed and it was never emptied. The cart is still full. Could a crew come back for it this week?

Thank you,
Juan Hernandez

short_description: Pothole on Munroe Court near the 300 block deepening after rain
description:
Hello,

Juan Hernandez here, resident of 327 Munroe Court. There is a pothole on Munroe Court near the 300 block that has grown noticeably after the recent storms. It is deep enough now that cars are swerving around it. Requesting a repair before someone damages a tire.

Thank you,
Juan Hernandez

short_description: Broken streetlight at the Munroe Court and Ridgely Avenue corner
description:
Hello,

This is Juan Hernandez at 327 Munroe Court. The streetlight at the corner of Munroe Court and Ridgely Avenue has been out for about a week. The corner is very dark at night and I walk there most mornings. Please have it checked.

Thank you,
Juan Hernandez

short_description: Clogged storm drain flooding the curb on Munroe Court
description:
Hello,

Juan Hernandez, 327 Munroe Court. The storm drain in front of my house is clogged with leaves and debris, and water pools across the curb and into the street whenever it rains. Could a crew come clear the grate?

Thank you,
Juan Hernandez

short_description: Recycling not picked up on Munroe Court — bin left full at curb
description:
Hello,

This is Juan Hernandez at 327 Munroe Court. My recycling bin was out on the scheduled day but was skipped again. It is the second week in a row. Please arrange collection and let me know the correct recycling day for our street.

Thank you,
Juan Hernandez

short_description: Downed tree limb from storm blocking the sidewalk near 327 Munroe Court
description:
Hello,

Juan Hernandez here at 327 Munroe Court. A large limb came down in last night's wind and is lying across the public sidewalk near my property line. It is blocking the walkway. Requesting removal so pedestrians can get by safely.

Thank you,
Juan Hernandez

short_description: Yard waste bags left at curb not collected on Munroe Court
description:
Hello,

This is Juan Hernandez, 327 Munroe Court. I set out four paper yard-waste bags of leaves and trimmings on the posted collection day, but they were left behind. Could the yard-waste crew make a return trip?

Thank you,
Juan Hernandez

short_description: Faded stop sign at Munroe Court intersection hard to see at dusk
description:
Hello,

Juan Hernandez, 327 Munroe Court. The stop sign at the intersection at the end of Munroe Court is badly faded and difficult to see at dusk. I would like to request a replacement before it becomes a safety issue.

Thank you,
Juan Hernandez

short_description: Overflowing trash cart on Munroe Court after holiday-week delay
description:
Hello,

This is Juan Hernandez at 327 Munroe Court. Collection was delayed over the holiday week and my cart is now overflowing. Could I confirm the adjusted pickup date, and can the crew take the extra bag I set beside the cart?

Thank you,
Juan Hernandez

short_description: Standing water and eroded shoulder along Munroe Court after storms
description:
Hello,

Juan Hernandez, 327 Munroe Court. The roadside ditch along Munroe Court is holding standing water and the shoulder is eroding after the recent storms. Requesting the drainage crew take a look before it undercuts the pavement.

Thank you,
Juan Hernandez

short_description: Missed bulk-item pickup for old mattress set out on Munroe Court
description:
Hello,

This is Juan Hernandez at 327 Munroe Court. I scheduled a bulk-item pickup for an old mattress and set it at the curb on the assigned date, but it was not collected. Could the bulk crew be re-dispatched?

Thank you,
Juan Hernandez

short_description: Streetlight flickering intermittently on Ridgely Avenue near Munroe Court
description:
Hello,

Juan Hernandez, 327 Munroe Court. A streetlight on Ridgely Avenue just up from Munroe Court flickers on and off through the night. It is not fully out but is clearly failing. Please add it to the maintenance list.

Thank you,
Juan Hernandez

short_description: Cracked and uneven sidewalk panel a tripping hazard on Munroe Court
description:
Hello,

This is Juan Hernandez at 327 Munroe Court. A sidewalk panel a few doors down has heaved and cracked, leaving a raised edge that is a real tripping hazard. Several of us walk here each morning. Requesting an inspection and repair.

Thank you,
Juan Hernandez

short_description: Recycling cart cracked and lid broken — requesting replacement
description:
Hello,

Juan Hernandez, 327 Munroe Court. My county recycling cart has a large crack in the side and the lid no longer closes, so paper blows out on windy days. Could I request a replacement cart?

Thank you,
Juan Hernandez

short_description: Clogged roadside catch basin overflowing onto Munroe Court
description:

This is Juan Hernandez at 327 Munroe Court. The catch basin at the low point of Munroe Court is clogged and overflowing into the roadway during heavy rain. Requesting the stormwater crew clear it before the next storm.

Juan Hernandez

Juan Hernandez here, resident of 327 Munroe Court. There is a pothole on Munroe Court near the 300 block that has grown noticeably after the recent storms. It is deep enough now that cars are swerving around it. Requesting a repair before someone damages a tire.

Thank you,
Juan Hernandez

short_description: Broken streetlight at the Munroe Court and Ridgely Avenue corner
description:
Hello,

This is Juan Hernandez at 327 Munroe Court. The streetlight at the corner of Munroe Court and Ridgely Avenue has been out for about a week. The corner is very dark at night and I walk there most mornings. Please have it checked.

Thank you,
Juan Hernandez

short_description: Clogged storm drain flooding the curb on Munroe Court
description:
Hello,

Juan Hernandez, 327 Munroe Court. The storm drain in front of my house is clogged with leaves and debris, and water pools across the curb and into the street whenever it rains. Could a crew come clear the grate?

Thank you,
Juan Hernandez

short_description: Recycling not picked up on Munroe Court — bin left full at curb
description:
Hello,

This is Juan Hernandez at 327 Munroe Court. My recycling bin was out on the scheduled day but was skipped again. It is the second week in a row. Please arrange collection and let me know the correct recycling day for our street.

Thank you,
Juan Hernandez

short_description: Downed tree limb from storm blocking the sidewalk near 327 Munroe Court
description:
Hello,

Juan Hernandez here at 327 Munroe Court. A large limb came down in last night's wind and is lying across the public sidewalk near my property line. It is blocking the walkway. Requesting removal so pedestrians can get by safely.

Thank you,
Juan Hernandez

short_description: Yard waste bags left at curb not collected on Munroe Court
description:
Hello,

This is Juan Hernandez, 327 Munroe Court. I set out four paper yard-waste bags of leaves and trimmings on the posted collection day, but they were left behind. Could the yard-waste crew make a return trip?

Thank you,
Juan Hernandez

short_description: Faded stop sign at Munroe Court intersection hard to see at dusk
description:
Hello,

Juan Hernandez, 327 Munroe Court. The stop sign at the intersection at the end of Munroe Court is badly faded and difficult to see at dusk. I would like to request a replacement before it becomes a safety issue.

Thank you,
Juan Hernandez

short_description: Overflowing trash cart on Munroe Court after holiday-week delay
description:
Hello,

This is Juan Hernandez at 327 Munroe Court. Collection was delayed over the holiday week and my cart is now overflowing. Could I confirm the adjusted pickup date, and can the crew take the extra bag I set beside the cart?

Thank you,
Juan Hernandez

short_description: Standing water and eroded shoulder along Munroe Court after storms
description:
Hello,

Juan Hernandez, 327 Munroe Court. The roadside ditch along Munroe Court is holding standing water and the shoulder is eroding after the recent storms. Requesting the drainage crew take a look before it undercuts the pavement.

Thank you,
Juan Hernandez

short_description: Missed bulk-item pickup for old mattress set out on Munroe Court
description:
Hello,

This is Juan Hernandez at 327 Munroe Court. I scheduled a bulk-item pickup for an old mattress and set it at the curb on the assigned date, but it was not collected. Could the bulk crew be re-dispatched?

Thank you,
Juan Hernandez

short_description: Streetlight flickering intermittently on Ridgely Avenue near Munroe Court
description:
Hello,

Juan Hernandez, 327 Munroe Court. A streetlight on Ridgely Avenue just up from Munroe Court flickers on and off through the night. It is not fully out but is clearly failing. Please add it to the maintenance list.

Thank you,
Juan Hernandez

short_description: Cracked and uneven sidewalk panel a tripping hazard on Munroe Court
description:
Hello,

This is Juan Hernandez at 327 Munroe Court. A sidewalk panel a few doors down has heaved and cracked, leaving a raised edge that is a real tripping hazard. Several of us walk here each morning. Requesting an inspection and repair.

Thank you,
Juan Hernandez

short_description: Recycling cart cracked and lid broken — requesting replacement
description:
Hello,

Juan Hernandez, 327 Munroe Court. My county recycling cart has a large crack in the side and the lid no longer closes, so paper blows out on windy days. Could I request a replacement cart?

Thank you,
Juan Hernandez

short_description: Clogged roadside catch basin overflowing onto Munroe Court
description:
Hello,

This is Juan Hernandez at 327 Munroe Court. The catch basin at the low point of Munroe Court is clogged and overflowing into the roadway during heavy rain. Requesting the stormwater crew clear it before the next storm.

Thank you,
Juan Hernandez

short_description: Missed trash collection on Munroe Court — cart set out but not emptied
description:
Hello,

This is Juan Hernandez at 327 Munroe Court in West Annapolis. My trash cart was at the curb by 6:30 AM on the regular Tuesday pickup, but the truck passed and it was never emptied. The cart is still full. Could a crew come back for it this week?

Thank you,
Juan Hernandez

short_description: Pothole on Munroe Court near the 300 block deepening after rain

Hello,

Juan Hernandez here, resident of 327 Munroe Court. There is a pothole on Munroe Court near the 300 block that has grown noticeably after the recent storms. It is deep enough now that cars are swerving around it. Requesting a repair before someone damages a tire.

Juan Hernandez
